metadata.description: Comprehensive Claude Code skills and agents for homelab service management - media automation, infrastructure monitoring, document management, and more

plugins.name: homelab-core
plugins.description: Core homelab functionality - interactive credential setup wizard (/homelab-core:setup), service health dashboard (/homelab-core:health), specialized agents (agentic-orchestrator, exa-specialist, firecrawl-specialist, notebooklm-specialist) and commands (/agentic-research, /firecrawl:*, /homelab:*, /notebooklm:*)

plugins.name: plex
plugins.description: Control Plex Media Server - browse libraries, search media, check what's playing, view recently added

plugins.name: radarr
plugins.description: Search and add movies to Radarr library with collection support. Includes both safe operations and destructive operations (with confirmation)

plugins.name: sonarr
plugins.description: Search and add TV shows to Sonarr library. Includes both safe operations and destructive operations (with confirmation)

plugins.name: overseerr
plugins.description: Request movies and TV shows via Overseerr, monitor request status, and manage media requests

plugins.name: prowlarr
plugins.description: Search indexers and manage Prowlarr for torrent and usenet searching

plugins.name: tautulli
plugins.description: Monitor and analyze Plex Media Server usage via Tautulli analytics API - viewing history, user statistics, stream analytics

plugins.name: qbittorrent
plugins.description: Manage torrents with qBittorrent WebUI API - add, pause, resume, and delete torrents

plugins.name: sabnzbd
plugins.description: Manage Usenet downloads with SABnzbd API - queue management, NZB handling, download monitoring

plugins.name: unraid
plugins.description: Query and monitor Unraid servers via GraphQL API - array status, disk health, containers, VMs, system monitoring

plugins.name: unifi
plugins.description: Monitor UniFi network via local gateway API - device status, client monitoring, network health, DPI statistics

plugins.name: tailscale
plugins.description: Manage Tailscale mesh VPN networks - device status, file sharing, funnel, serve, auth keys, exit nodes

plugins.name: zfs
plugins.description: Manage ZFS pools in homelab environment - health monitoring, snapshot management with Sanoid/Syncoid, replication, scrub scheduling. CRITICAL: Enforces mandatory double confirmation for destructive operations

plugins.name: fail2ban-swag
plugins.description: Manage fail2ban intrusion prevention inside SWAG reverse proxy container - ban/unban IPs, jail management, filter testing

plugins.name: gotify
plugins.description: Send push notifications via Gotify for task completion alerts and system notifications

plugins.name: linkding
plugins.description: Manage bookmarks with Linkding API - save, search, tag, archive bookmarks and create bundles

plugins.name: memos
plugins.description: Manage notes and memos in self-hosted Memos service - create, search, tag, and organize personal notes

plugins.name: bytestash
plugins.description: Manage code snippets in ByteStash - multi-file support, share management, auto-categorization for 30+ languages

plugins.name: paperless-ngx
plugins.description: Manage documents in Paperless-ngx - upload with auto-OCR, full-text search, tag management, bulk operations

plugins.name: radicale
plugins.description: Manage calendars and contacts on self-hosted Radicale CalDAV/CardDAV server - events, contacts, natural language parsing

plugins.name: nugs
plugins.description: Download and manage live music from Nugs.net with video-first support - browse 13,000+ concerts, download audio/video, track coverage

plugins.name: notebooklm
plugins.description: Programmatic access to Google NotebookLM - create notebooks, add sources, chat with content, generate artifacts (podcasts, videos, reports)

plugins.name: gh-address-comments
plugins.description: Address PR comments and fix review feedback using gh CLI - systematic handling of GitHub code review comments
